name_en: Loewe🌟 New Version 🆕 New Arrival Small Classic Calfskin Puzzle Belt Bag🌟
name_cn:
Loewe🌟 New Version 🆕 New Arrival Small Classic Calfskin Puzzle Belt Bag🌟
*The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines. This small belt bag is made of classic calfskin, featuring overlapping edges. Can be worn on the shoulder or crossbody*
*Adjustable shoulder strap with metal buckle closure, engraved with LOEWE logo*
*Zipper closure, calfskin zipper pull*
*External zip pocket and internal slip pocket*
*One external zip pocket*
*Herringbone cotton canvas lining*
*Anagram embossed🌟
size:24*16*10.5
Model: 062344
